text: This page is part of the FHIR Specification (v5. 0. 0: R5 - ). This is the current published version. For a full list of available versions, see the FHIR is a standard for health care data exchange, published by HL7®.

Basic framework on which the specification is built Supporting implementation and binding to external specifications Linking to real-world concepts in the healthcare system Record-keeping and Data Exchange for the healthcare process Providing the ability to reason about the healthcare process Specifications based on the FHIR standard All publicly available FHIR specification artifacts Enabling health interoperability through FHIR FHIR Confluence (working & internal documentation) Note that translations are not always up to date Note: This specification requires a browser that is SVG compatible (Microsoft Internet Explorer 10+/Edge, Firefox 3.
